code: import api from'./api';export const authService={login:async(email,password)=>{const response=await api.post('/auth/login',{email,password});return response.data;},register:async userData=>{const response=await api.post('/auth/register',userData);return response.data;},logout:()=>{localStorage.removeItem('token');},getCurrentUser:async()=>{const response=await api.get('/auth/me');return response.data;}};
